lb-19of.title: Maze solver with solution display
lb-19of.description: BFS solver from start to end, show/hide solution path on canvas

lb-1jf7.title: Custom start/end point selection
lb-1jf7.description: Allow users to click cells to set custom start and end points instead of hardcoded top-left/bottom-right

lb-2ejg.title: Canvas rendering + basic UI
lb-2ejg.description: Canvas maze drawing, wrap indicators, config panel, generate button

lb-2ux0.title: Fix Kruskal's edge deduplication performance
lb-2ux0.description: Replace O(n) Array.some() with Set<string> for wall key dedup in Kruskal's algorithm (both instant and animated versions)

lb-5q15.title: Phase 3: UX Improvements
lb-5q15.description: Third phase: solver animation, undo/redo in edit mode, zoom/pan, and UI polish

lb-88gd.title: Skinny pig theming + polish
lb-88gd.description: Color palette, pig mascot, themed UI, topology info panel

lb-9ah2.title: Animated solver visualization
lb-9ah2.description: Animate the BFS solver step by step, showing exploration frontier and final path

lb-9bsm.title: Add maze size presets
lb-9bsm.description: Add Small/Medium/Large preset buttons to quickly set common maze sizes

lb-cg1b.title: Keyboard accessibility + responsive polish
lb-cg1b.description: Keyboard nav for config, ARIA labels, mobile layout improvements

lb-ffqj.title: Undo/redo in wall edit mode
lb-ffqj.description: Track wall toggle history and support ctrl+z/ctrl+shift+z in edit mode

lb-l7l1.title: Non-Planar Maze Generator
lb-l7l1.description: Full maze generator app with non-planar topology support, UI, editing, and skinny pig theming

lb-m6dk.title: Export maze as PNG image
lb-m6dk.description: Add a button to export the current maze (with solution if shown) as a PNG image using canvas.toDataURL

lb-mbwq.title: Animated maze generation
lb-mbwq.description: Step-by-step animation of maze generation algorithm

lb-riil.title: Phase 2: Polish & Features
lb-riil.description: Second phase: performance fixes, export, custom start/end, difficulty scoring

lb-t8lw.title: Project scaffold + core maze engine
lb-t8lw.description: Vite+React+TS scaffold, topology system, wall storage, DFS algorithm

lb-uc58.title: Weave support for Kruskal's and Prim's
lb-uc58.description: Extend weave maze support beyond DFS to Kruskal's and Prim's algorithms

lb-uz63.title: Implement 2D non-planar crossings (weave maze)
lb-uz63.description: Implement 2D weave mazes where paths can cross over/under each other within a single grid cell. See SPEC.md for updated requirements and theme details (skinny pigs = hairless guinea pigs).

lb-voc2.title: Edit mode + additional algorithms
lb-voc2.description: Wall toggle editing, Kruskal's, Prim's algorithms

lb-x83f.title: Maze difficulty scoring
lb-x83f.description: Calculate and display maze difficulty based on solution path length ratio, decision points, dead-end ratio
